description: Marque editing-craft knowledge base v2 — operational rules with numbers, consumed by app/knowledge.py digest() and stamped into job['knowledge_version'] for A/B + revert. v2 adds transitions / sound design / hook visual grammar / per-format playbooks (researched + distilled 2026-07). P5 (2026-07-13): pacing.md/retention.md/sound_design.md annotated with the retention-editor upgrade's code-enforced numbers (silence-policy v3 speed bands, interrupt cadence, hook/end-card guidance, deterministic SFX) — states editorial intent only, the exact math lives in app/retention.py.
